nodes.label: Universal Agent Harness Operating Contract
nodes.rationale: Agents must operate through documents, evidence, validation gates, and scoped tasks instead of memory alone.

nodes.label: Local-First Single-App Architecture
nodes.rationale: The architecture favors a small local app with no backend, authentication, external AI provider, or external API for the MVP.

nodes.label: Low-Friction Todo Reward Loop
nodes.rationale: Checking a task must be enough to earn reward progress, and the daily wrap-up is the main reward reveal moment.

nodes.label: Operational Recovery Manual
nodes.rationale: Agents must follow this runbook instead of improvising when failures occur.
